subject: ENGLISH
title: Compose texts to react to a topic.
objective: Compose texts to react to a topic.
introduction: Every good reader knows some words by heart — like magic! ✨ In today's lesson, 'Compose texts to react to a', you'll practice reading words instantly. Ready to become a word wizard?
